# Dashboard Overview

The dashboard gives you a real-time snapshot of your dispatch operations — jobs, technicians, and AI optimization status at a glance.

## Key Metrics

- Total jobs (pending, assigned, completed)
- Technician utilization
- AI dispatch suggestions awaiting review
- System health status

## Navigation

Use the sidebar to access all dashboard sections:
- **Jobs** — Manage and track all service jobs
- **Technicians** — View technician profiles and availability
- **Calendar** — Visual schedule for all technicians
- **AI Dispatch** — AI-powered job assignment optimization
- **Capacity** — Capacity planning and forecasting
